channel.title: filesharing on Have an average day :|
channel.description: Recent content in filesharing on Have an average day :|

item.title: Filelocker
item.description: Filelocker. Filelocker is a web based secure file sharing application that facilitates easy file sharing between users at an organization and promotes secure data sharing habits. Filelocker was developed by IT Networks and Security at Purdue University for the purpose of allowing students and faculty to share files with other people both inside and outside of Purdue University. It is a temporary and secure storage system for sharing files and data.
